name: Michael Monroe
description: '''Matti Antero Kristian Fagerholm''' (born 17 June 1962), known professionally as '''Michael Monroe''', is a Finnish rock musician who rose to fame as the vocalist and saxophonist for the [[glam punk]] band [[Hanoi Rocks]]. He has also served as the frontman for all-star side projects, such as [[Demolition 23]] and Jerusalem Slim (with [[Steve Stevens]]).
